scripts.dev: pnpm dev:services && pnpm dev:prepare && pnpm dev:apps
scripts.dev:services: docker compose up -d postgres && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/wait-for-postgres.ps1
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -n backend,frontend,docs -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @pharmacy-pos/backend dev" "pnpm --filter @pharmacy-pos/frontend dev" "pnpm --filter @pharmacy-pos/docs dev"
